props.heading: Analytics that explain themselves.
props.subheading: Lumen turns your product data into plain-language answers — so every team ships with conviction, not guesswork.

props.heading: Everything you need to understand your product
props.subheading: No SQL, no dashboards graveyard. Ask in words, get answers you can act on.

features.title: Ask in plain English
features.body: Type a question, get a chart and a one-line takeaway. Lumen writes the query for you.

features.title: Narrated trends
features.body: Every metric comes with an AI explanation of what changed and likely why.

features.title: Real-time alerts
features.body: Get pinged the moment a number moves outside its expected band.

features.title: Connect anything
features.body: Warehouses, Postgres, Stripe, Segment — live in minutes, no pipeline babysitting.

features.title: Governed by default
features.body: Row-level permissions and audit trails your security team will actually approve.

features.title: Share as stories
features.body: Turn an investigation into a shareable, narrated report in one click.

props.heading: Built for the people who actually ask the questions

features.title: “We cancelled three dashboards.”
features.body: Lumen answers in seconds what used to be a Friday-afternoon SQL spelunking session.

features.title: “Onboarding took one coffee.”
features.body: Connected our warehouse and had the exec team self-serving the same day.

props.heading: See your data explain itself.
props.subheading: Free for 14 days. No credit card. Cancel anytime.
